description: Informed consent obtained after first dose administered
ground_truth_rationale: ICH E6 4.8.1: Consent must be obtained before any trial-related procedure. Subject safety and rights compromised.

description: Blood sample collected 30 minutes outside protocol window
ground_truth_rationale: Minor timing deviation within acceptable variance; document in deviation log, no impact on data integrity.

description: IP stored at room temperature for 48 hours due to refrigerator failure
ground_truth_rationale: Drug stability compromised. ICH E6 5.14: IP must be stored per protocol. Quarantine affected units, assess subject safety, report to sponsor and IRB within 24 hours.

description: Subject took prohibited concomitant medication (strong CYP3A4 inhibitor) for 5 days
ground_truth_rationale: Potential PK interaction affecting drug exposure. Report to sponsor, assess if subject should continue, may need PK sub-study data exclusion.

description: ECG performed using non-validated portable device instead of protocol-specified 12-lead
ground_truth_rationale: Data from non-validated device cannot be used for safety assessment. Repeat ECG with correct equipment, report deviation to sponsor.

description: Subject missed two consecutive study visits without notification
ground_truth_rationale: Assess subject willingness to continue. Document missed visits, attempt recontact, schedule make-up visits if within window.

description: Unblinded treatment assignment accidentally revealed to site staff
ground_truth_rationale: ICH E6 5.2: Blinding integrity critical to trial validity. Assess extent of unblinding, may need to replace affected site staff, potential data exclusion.

description: PI delegated IP administration to unqualified staff member
ground_truth_rationale: ICH E6 4.2.5: PI must ensure qualified delegation. Review all doses given by unqualified staff, retrain site, update delegation log.

description: Source documents for 3 subjects found to have retrospective data entries
ground_truth_rationale: ICH E6 4.9.1: Source data must be recorded contemporaneously. Potential data integrity issue. Report to sponsor, may trigger for-cause audit.

description: Study drug dose reduced by site without sponsor approval
ground_truth_rationale: Unauthorized dose modification violates protocol. Report to sponsor, assess subject safety, determine if subject can continue at correct dose.

description: Lab sample hemolyzed; results reported without notation
ground_truth_rationale: Hemolyzed specimens may yield inaccurate results for potassium and LDH. Recollect sample, annotate affected results in database.

description: Serious adverse event not reported to sponsor within 24 hours as required
ground_truth_rationale: ICH E6 4.11: Timely SAE reporting is mandatory. Late reporting may compromise subject safety across all sites. Immediate corrective action and root cause analysis required.
